commit_scope: Repair Hostinger deploy content sync after PR #2704 exposed a race where .cursor/skills was copied into /app/.cursor/skills before /app/.cursor existed in the recreated API container.

commands: git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
local_validation.notes: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27193995954 failed in Roll forward VPS because docker compose cp could not find /app/.cursor in the recreated API container while copying repo/.cursor/skills. The script now copies the repo .cursor directory into existing /app, avoiding the missing-parent race and preserving the validator assets.

known_failed_attempts.output: Error response from daemon: Could not find the file /app/.cursor in container ...
known_failed_attempts.resolution: Copy repo/.cursor to api:/app instead of copying repo/.cursor/skills to api:/app/.cursor/skills.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI and deploy rerun are pending until this repair branch is pushed and merged.

deploy_validation.notes: The next Hostinger Auto Deploy run should pass Roll forward VPS and continue to public deployment verification.

phase_gate.notes: Local proof pending; push, PR, CI, merge, deploy rerun, and public verification remain.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Deploy content sync no longer fails when the API container is recreated without an existing /app/.cursor parent directory.
test_flows: Hostinger Auto Deploy reaches public verification after Roll forward VPS.
Public /api/household/events returns native-kernel headers after deployment.

evidence_refs: GitHub Actions run 27193995954 failed on docker compose cp repo/.cursor/skills to api:/app/.cursor/skills.
deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh now copies repo/.cursor to api:/app so /app is the existing parent.
